texto: I'm thinking, 'Man, there's this whole other group of people that are attached to me because of my last name and my family's roots.' That's pretty cool. That's special, that's a lot of power and it's important.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Sanchez sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm thinking, 'Man, there's this whole other group of people that are attached to me because of m…” articula reflexao, family, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como power e man.

frase_original: I'm thinking, 'Man, there's this whole other group of people that are attached to me because of my last name and my family's roots.' That's pretty cool. That's special, that's a lot of power and it's important.

texto: To mark the 10-year anniversary of 9/11, I wanted to launch an FDNY shirt that pays tribute to the brave first responders who, like my father, risk their lives in the line of duty on a regular basis. All of the proceeds raised from the sale of the T-shirt benefit the New York Police & Fire Widows' & Children's Benefit Fund.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Sanchez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “To mark the 10-year anniversary of 9/11, I wanted to launch an FDNY shirt that pays tribute to th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, children, father pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de father e fire.

All of the proceeds raised from the sale of the T-shirt benefit the New York Police & Fire Widows' & Children's Benefit Fund.
